cards.back: Shifts the smaller elements to the left of the current element

cards.front: What is the time complexity of Insertion Sort?
cards.back: O(n^2) in the worst case scenario

cards.front: Is Insertion Sort a comparison-based sorting algorithm?
What is the best-case time complexity of Insertion Sort?
cards.back: O(n) when the input list is already sorted

cards.front: Does Insertion Sort only work for sorted lists?
cards.back: No, it can be used to sort any list
